---
title: 'Measure Your Sucess'
date: '2015-02-23T01:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4043370403650187034'
blogger_filename: '/2015/02/measure-your-sucess.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Keys To Success'
---

<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><br />The metrics you use create the environment you experience.</blockquote><br /><br /><br />I "grew up" in my career in a highly charged sales call center. Metrics. Metrics. Metrics. Everything was measured.<br /><br />As I examine other areas of my life I find an interesting pattern. If I am not measuring things, I'm not paying attention to them. It's one thing to put something on the calendar or tasks list, it's another thing to sit down and get it done.<br /><br />If you want an environment charged with excellence and expectation, you have to measure where you are and where you are trying to be. You will not know if you are getting closer without it.<br /><br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">Matthew 7:2 NKJV  <br />For with what judgment you judge, you will be judged; and with the measure you use, it will be measured back to you.  </blockquote><br /><br /><br />In other words... will I #<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a>? <br /><br /><br />---<br /><h4>And now I leave you with a question:</h4><h4>&nbsp; </h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>So... what are your thoughts about this? What did this make you think about?&nbsp;</b></blockquote><br /><b>Hit me up on Twitter <a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe </a>or on Google <a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a></b><br /><h4> </h4><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-jesus.html" target="_blank">Got Jesus? </a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">About This Blog, and Darrell.&nbsp;</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Suggestions for other: Bloggers, Authors, Ministries, Thought Leaders, and More </a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: Georgia,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box: suggestions for some of the tools I've used in my journey. </a></span></li></ul></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" height="232" width="320" /></a></div>
